2
Section breakdown
Content
Step 1: title, description, salary, location, job type
Step 2: paste JD → parseJobDescription → auto-fill requirements
Step 3: editable requirements table (add/delete/edit rows)
Interaction
Step indicator at top (Step X of 5)
Draft auto-saved at step 1 → jobId persisted in state
Step 2: 500ms min spinner. Skip link available.
Step 3: inline table editing, add/delete row buttons
Data deps
POST /jobs/draftPOST /jobs/:id/parse-jdPOST /jobs/:id/confirm-requirements
Content
Header: "Attach escrow" + Solana logo + "Powered by Solana" badge
Subtext: "Lock SOL as proof of commitment. Released when you hire."
Wallet connection → SOL amount input → escrow address shown → paste txSignature → confirm
"Skip for now" link always visible
Hierarchy + Interaction
Visually distinct: Solana purple/teal accent on card border
Sub-states: NOT_CONNECTED → CONNECTED → FUNDED
Tx link on success: "View on Solana Explorer"
Skip: proceeds to step 5 without escrow state
Data deps
POST /escrow/confirm-fundedGET /escrow/status/:jobPostId
Content
Summary card: title, salary, requirement count
Escrow badge: "X SOL locked" (green) or "No escrow" (muted)
"Publish job" CTA. "Back to edit" link.
Interaction
Publish → publishJob(jobId) → redirect to /hr/jobs/:id
If escrow funded: tx link shown on confirmation
Data deps
POST /jobs/:id/publish
